description: UPC registry mapping each basket item to confirmed barcodes. Sourced from Open Food Facts API queries (batches 1-3, completed 2026-04-10).
notes: 62 of 85 items have confirmed UPCs from online databases
10 fresh produce items use standardized PLU codes (no UPC needed)
7 fresh meat items are priced by posted $/lb (no UPC needed)
5 items need a single Foodland shelf visit to scan barcodes
1 item (Diamond Bakery arare) is a regional Hawaii product not in any online UPC database
